name: Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection
title: Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection
syntax: long Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection(dbNode counterpart, dword nextState); // form 2
long Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection(byte counterpartAddress, dword nextState); // form 4
long Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection(dbNode participant, dbNode counterpart); // form 5
long Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection(dbNode participant, dbNode counterpart, dword nextState); // form 6
long Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection(dbNode participant, byte counterpartAddress); // form 7
long Iso11783IL_TIMContinueConnection(dbNode participant, byte counterpartAddress, dword nextState); // form 8
description: Continues a connection which has been frozen by Iso11783IL_TIMFreezeConnection.
Form 1, 3, 5, and 7 continues the state of the currently frozen connection by execution the action of this state.
Form 2, 4, 6 and 8 continues with the specified state and executes the action of this state.

parameters.name: counterpart
parameters.description: TIM counterpart of the client/server connection.

parameters.name: counterpartAddress
parameters.description: Address of TIM counterpart of the client/server connection.

parameters.name: participant
parameters.description: TIM participant (TIM server or TIM client).

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
